name: Velveeta Mexican Dip
recipeIngredient: 1 can Rotel diced tomatoes and green chilies
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the hamburger and drain.
2. Add the browned hamburger, enchilada sauce, and Rotel to a crockpot or Dutch oven.
3. Cut Velveeta into cubes and add to the mixture.
4. Cook until the Velveeta is melted, stirring frequently.
5. Serve with tortilla chips or Frito-Lay scoops for dipping. Great for parties!
